overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character transitions from a sunlit sidewalk past commercial buildings into the shadow of an elevated highway and industrial district featuring massive ventilation structures and the DTK mega-tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban sidewalk with commercial storefronts

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive DTK industrial tower against the sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise building with illuminated yellow signage and neon accents
massive concrete and steel overpass spanning across the street
tall industrial skyscraper with visible DTK signage and steam vents
black and yellow striped posts lining the curb edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk during golden hour, passing a yellow commercial building with neon signage. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive DTK industrial tower in the distance, with an elevated highway structure spanning the street ahead.

events.description: character enters the deep shadow cast by the elevated highway, significantly darkening the scene
moving from open sunlit street to the covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the shadow of the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
commercial buildings visible in the shadow under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street, moving from bright sunlight into the shadow of the massive overpass. A white van drives through the intersection as the environment transitions from commercial storefronts to the darker industrial zone beneath the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street beneath elevated highway with massive ventilation infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to showcase the massive industrial ventilation pipes and tower facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial road under the overpass, passing vehicles and industrial structures

entered.detail: massive twin exhaust pipes with steam venting from the industrial complex
concrete industrial building with green paneling and metal walkways
the underside of the elevated highway with structural beams and embedded lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking through the industrial zone beneath the overpass, the scene is dominated by massive ventilation pipes emitting steam and the imposing DTK tower rising ahead. The camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the industrial architecture and the complex network of pipes and walkways against the evening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit commercial sidewalk into the oppressive shadow of a massive industrial district. It begins with the character walking past a yellow building with neon signage during the golden hour, as the camera tilts up to reveal the distant DTK tower and an elevated highway spanning the street. As the character crosses the asphalt intersection and a white van drives past, the bright sunlight fades into the deep shade of the overpass. The scene then shifts into a darker industrial zone dominated by massive ventilation pipes emitting steam, before the camera tilts upward once more to emphasize the towering scale of the DTK architecture and the complex network of walkways against the evening sky.
